recentTweets.text:
A recent report from the @WhiteHouse's Domestic Policy Council has found one of America's premier institutions, the National Museum of American History, has miserably failed to present our nation’s history objectively. 

Read my thoughts on the matter below:

Nebraska's agriculture industry is in great hands with young leaders like @NebraskaFFA's 2026-2027 State Officers at the helm. 

Appreciated the opportunity to visit with them about their vision for our state's number one industry during their trip to Washington! https://t.co/Rpzr2UgMxh

Always enjoy seeing some familiar faces in Washington at Nebraska Breakfast! 

#HistoryInTheMaking https://t.co/WJsZ7DBwBc

Tonight, I voted to make daylight saving time permanent—a position many of my constituents have urged me to take. I look forward to continuing to engage with my constituents to ensure that their voices are reflected in every vote I cast.

Tonight, I joined @SecRollins and leaders from across our nation to celebrate 250 years of American agriculture at Mount Vernon. 

Just like George Washington, I have no doubt America's agriculture producers will continue to shape our country's future for years to come! https://t.co/EpAgd7S6VA

I visited Regional West Medical Center in Scottsbluff, to learn more about their ongoing efforts to provide Nebraskans with quality care close to home. 

As the region’s only tertiary referral medical center, they play a critical role in ensuring that Nebraskans have access to https://t.co/xTQuqYpVz7

Always enjoy visiting the Western Nebraska Veterans Home and hearing directly from residents about how I can better serve veterans in Congress. 

Thank you, Administrator Stavely and your entire team, for showing me around your facility and for all that you do to care for our https://t.co/mNWNm8SjxI

When I am not fighting for Nebraskans in Washington, I am back home meeting with constituents across Nebraska's Third District.

Read about my recent travels in my column this week: 
https://t.co/QirnIp8Es5

The United States is a leader in innovation-intensive industries, and digital services are no exception.

Stop by today until 6:00 pm MT and tomorrow from 10:00 am to 6:00 pm MT to see everything this mobile museum has to offer! 

#Freedom250 #NebraskaThirdDistrict https://t.co/gqwFqTXDFq

Washington's headlines don't determine success—Nebraska’s families do.

One year later, the Working Families Tax Cuts are helping Nebraskans keep more of what they earn and strengthening communities across our state.

Learn how in my latest @OWHnews op-ed:
https://t.co/kgBlhb4UPb

Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸

Today, we celebrate 250 years of our great nation and honor the generations that came before us who fought to secure the many freedoms we enjoy. 

With gratitude for our past and hope for our future, God Bless America! https://t.co/EietY7mzTy

250 years ago, our Founders pledged their lives, their fortunes, and their sacred honor to establish a nation built on the timeless principles of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

Read more in my column this week: 
https://t.co/poc0tZplUA

I appreciate Chairman Jordan’s attention to these concerning actions in South Korea. 

The message is clear – discriminatory treatment of U.S. companies can’t stand.

House Republicans voted to help farmers and fore…

 https://t.co/QtxKCGH6qf

This #NationalDairyMonth, I had the chance to meet with Land O’Lakes farmer‑owners from Nebraska and across the country during their visit to Washington. 

In Congress, I’ll continue working for policies that give America’s farmers the certainty and market access they rely on. https://t.co/Pr7Vm9mOxx

To my dad and all of the fathers across Nebraska's Third District, thank you for your hard work, sacrifice, and support. Today, we celebrate the many ways you strengthen our families and communities.

Wishing you a blessed and joyful Father's Day! https://t.co/i8M3boia4H

No matter how you choose to spend it, Nebraska’s Third District is the perfect place to enjoy summer. 

Learn about some of the community celebrations and hometown traditions filling calendars across our great state in my column this week: 
https://t.co/rbJuiu3MjT

Enjoyed visiting with members of @NNFANALA during their trip to Washington. We talked about the challenges they face and how we can work together to ensure that Nebraskans have access to the care they need. https://t.co/fHQUDG9N9t

Had a productive meeting with members of @NECattlemen during their recent trip to Washington. 

We discussed how we can continue to work together to assist in the ongoing wildfire recovery efforts and combat the rising New World Screwworm threat. https://t.co/0oCeWaECcC
251 years of courage, sacrifice, and unwavering service. Grateful for every Soldier—past and present—who has answered the call. https://t.co/fggzvkMwJE

Thank you, @ENERGY for releasing an updated 45ZCF‑GREET model that:
 
1). Delivers clarity for farmers and fuel producers.
 
2). Removes unscientific penalties that put American feedstocks at a disadvantage.

3). Builds upon our efforts in the Working Families Tax Cuts. https://t.co/5H7c56iUIp

Nebraskans deserve to feel safe in their own community, which starts by removing dangerous criminals from our streets. Read how Republicans are supporting federal law enforcement officers and their efforts to keep every American safe in this week's column.
https://t.co/5XROZbO3WP

To all Nebraskans affected by the wildfires, please stay alert and make sure you have a safe evacuation plan ready should conditions worsen.

Thank you to the brave first responders who are working around the clock to get these fires under control.
https://t.co/0PXkojYRTC
It’s officially summer and the perfect night to cheer on my Republican colleagues in the annual Congressional Baseball game! https://t.co/faRnL9tST7

My staff and I continue to monitor the situation and stand ready to assist in any way we can.
https://t.co/0qZpDALXaM

I supported the Secure America Act to ensure that our brave federal law enforcement officers have the resources they need to keep Americans safe. 

This legislation provides long-overdue funding and prevents Democrats from derailing continued efforts to keep our border secure. I

Today, on D-Day we honor their courage and sacrifice as we are reminded that freedom is never guaranteed. https://t.co/79L8waK6aq

Always love running into a fellow Husker fan wherever I go!

https://t.co/0O6gv2EEJY

ICYMI: My Main Street Pharmacy Access Act PASSED out of @WaysandMeansGOP! 

Grateful for the bipartisan support of my colleagues and look forward to working together to pass this commonsense legislation on the House Floor.

9 in 10 Americans live within 5 miles of a pharmacy, yet outdated barriers still prevent seniors from accessing timely care from trusted pharmacists close to home. 

Grateful my bipartisan Main Street Pharmacy Access Act passed out of @WaysandMeansGOP, bringing us one step closer https://t.co/6JzcGDs1N4

My staff and I stand ready to assist in any way that we can as you begin to recover from this devastating event.

kurdistanMentions.text:
Thank you, @ENERGY for releasing an updated 45ZCF‑GREET model that:
 
1). Delivers clarity for farmers and fuel producers.
 
2). Removes unscientific penalties that put American feedstocks at a disadvantage.

3). Builds upon our efforts in the Working Families Tax Cuts. https://t.co/5H7c56iUIp

Don't let bad actors try to fool you. 

Nationwide, year-round E15 is a win for consumers, a win for farmers, and a win for America's energy independence. https://t.co/MA0oJgxZ06

This week, the House passed my Nationwide Consumer and Fuel Retailer Choice Act on a bipartisan basis. Marking a major victory for Nebraska agriculture, American energy independence, and consumers across the country.

Learn more about this exciting news⬇️
https://t.co/BUBrCxaqGR

Thank you to all of my colleagues who voted in favor of consumer choice, expanded markets, and energy independence.

While the fight for nationwide, year-round E15 is not yet finished, yesterday's bipartisan passage of my bill marked a historic win!

Today’s House passage of my Nationwide Consumer and Fuel Retailer Choice Act marks a historic win for America’s consumers, farmers, and energy independence. 

For over a decade, I have championed nationwide, year-round E15 to end years of patchwork regulations and expand

To my colleagues in Congress, I urge you to stand with America’s consumers, farmers, and energy future by making nationwide, year-round E15 a reality.   
 
It is past time we deliver the certainty, affordability, and energy independence the American people deserve. https://t.co/ozhIjY86BR

Unfortunately, misinformation has fueled opposition to nationwide E15 for far too long.

Today, I joined a bipartisan group of colleagues to set the record straight on how year-round E15 lowers fuel costs, expands consumer choice, and strengthens American energy independence. https://t.co/kO5B6Kgm3w

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 7 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Adrian Smith. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 7 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-12T22:34:54Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
